lines.speaker: Usi
lines.text: It's not that good, it's a bit warm.

lines.speaker: Usi
lines.text: The curse has been removed. Word around the town is that you were the one who helped remove it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes that is correct. The spirits of the Elid cursed the town for throwing away a statue to Elidinis. I got it back

lines.speaker: Usi
lines.text: Well we thank you. You're pretty much a local hero now.
